description: Identify census tracts meeting the city's High-Risk Health Zone designation criteria using the dataset at /home/ga/GIS_Data/census_tracts.geojson and the criteria specified in /home/ga/GIS_Data/designation_criteria.txt. Export the qualifying tracts to /home/ga/GIS_Data/exports/high_risk_zones.geojson.

natural_language.prompt: You are a public health GIS analyst. The city has provided a census tract dataset with environmental and healthcare access metrics at /home/ga/GIS_Data/census_tracts.geojson. Your director has asked you to identify all census tracts that meet the criteria for the High-Risk Health Zone designation. Read the designation criteria document at /home/ga/GIS_Data/designation_criteria.txt, load the census tract data in QGIS, apply the appropriate spatial analysis, and export the qualifying high-risk tracts to /home/ga/GIS_Data/exports/high_risk_zones.geojson
